samples.text: All metals are chemical elements. A song is not a metal. Therefore, is a song a chemical element?
Every metal belongs to the category of chemical elements. A song is not a metal. Does it follow that a song is a chemical element?
All metallic elements are chemical elements. A folk song is not a metallic element. Therefore, is a folk song a chemical element?
A song is not in the group of metals. Only metals are stated to be chemical elements here. Based on this, is a song a chemical element?
All metals are chemical elements. A song is not a metal. Someone left the door open earlier. Therefore, is a song a chemical element?
